export_view.value:
RepairQ includes a powerful Business Intelligence (BI) Suite, provided through integration with Looker. This tool offers a set of visual dashboards covering key performance indicators (KPIs) essential for running a retail repair business. These reports allow you to quickly view important aspects of your business, such as sales trends, inventory levels, and repair progress, helping you make more informed decisions.

Our Business Intelligence (BI) Dashboards are available to Admin users on our Advanced and Professional plans. Users on the Advanced Plan can view a wide range of pre-built reports and dashboards, giving them access to critical insights about their business. However, they are limited to viewing these pre-made reports and cannot create new ones. Professional Plan users can view pre-built reports and build custom reports. This allows them to tailor reports to their specific needs and gain deeper insights from their data.

Additional Resources

  • Business Intelligence (BI) Resources

  • Reporting Resources

  • RepairQ Accounting Principles

Daily Snapshot

On the RepairQ Navigation Bar, go to Reports → Analytics. The Daily Snapshot provides a visual display of several key performance indicators (KPIs) that business owners typically monitor throughout the day. If you don't choose a location, it will default to the one you're currently logged in to. Removing the location filter will show a combined report for all locations under your account.

Once your Daily Snapshot loads, you’ll see a variety of important KPIs, including:

  • Gross sales and progress toward your daily average

  • Hours per repair compared to the daily average

  • Sales per man hour

  • Retail attachments per ticket

Month to Date Dashboards

Navigate to Dashboards → Month to Date, where you'll find a variety of current month-to-date dashboards.

Inventory

Displays data on month-to-date inventory purchases, consumption, projected consumption, RMA rate, and damage rate, with comparisons to the previous month. You can also view your current Inventory on Hand, with the percentage breakdown of each status.

Repairs

Provides insights into new repair tickets, ticket turn time, hours per repair, daily repairs per technician, rework rates, and data rates. It also includes projections for the rest of the month.

Sales

Displays net sales for the month to date, along with projected sales, gross profit margin, average ticket amount, number of new tickets, sales pace, and more. Projections for the full month are also included.

Profitability Estimate

Displays earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization (EBITDA), providing insights into your current month's profitability. You'll see a breakdown of gross profit estimate, gross sales, returns/discounts, and cost of goods sold (COGS), along with projections for the rest of the month.

Inventory Purchasing Dashboard

RMA % by Supplier

A visual graph displaying each supplier's RMA percentage over the last 90 days. The chart includes a color-coded key to help you identify which color corresponds to each supplier.

Inventory Purchases by Supplier

A visual graph showing how much you’ve spent with each supplier over the last 90 days. The chart includes a color-coded key to identify which color corresponds to each supplier.

Inventory Cost Movement

Displays your highest total cost items, along with their minimum, maximum, and average costs, as well as the last purchase dates.

Inventory Movement

Displays your highest-selling inventory items, including their reorder points, four-week average sales, current stock levels, last week's sales, and sales data from previous weeks.

Customer Dashboard

Provides insights into customer activity over the past 30 days, including the number of first-time and repeat purchases, average customer value, average tickets per customer, and a list of your top customers along with their total spending at your location.

Location Dashboard

Displays total sales, repair sales, and retail sales over the past 30 days, categorized by location.

Staff Dashboard

Provides insights into staff performance over the past 30 days, including clocked hours, sales per man hour, hours per repair, rework rate, and a highlight of your top sales and technician leaders.

START 1.21.1
